details: Coursework: Financial Computing, Statistical Methods, Machine Learning, Finance, Structured Credit, Financial Risk Management, Advanced Financial Derivatives, Stochastic Calculus

education.degree: B.S. in Information Sciences + Data Science, GPA 3.93/4
details: Dean's List: Fall 2021, 2022, 2024, Spring 2024; President of the UIUC Taiwanese Student Association
Coursework: Computer Science, Linear Algebra, Algorithms and Data Structures, Database Design and Prototyping

experience.title: Consumer Default and Financial Ruin Modeling
bullets: Developing synthetic household-level financial data calibrated from BLS, Federal Reserve SHED, and BEA datasets to simulate monthly income, spending, and debt trajectories.
Building ML models (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost) with SHAP analysis to predict consumer financial distress over a 12–36 month horizon.
Designing an optimization framework using binary search and simulation to compute personalized safe impulsive spending limits.

experience.title: Compulsory Military Service – Taiwan Marine Corps
bullets: Served in the Marines Division of the Taiwan Navy Forces, developing strong discipline, adaptability, and teamwork skills through intensive training and operational deployments.
Developed problem-solving and decision-making abilities in a high-pressure environment while serving as part of a cohesive team.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
bullets: Learned ASP.NET, C#, MVC design pattern, Entity Framework, and Web APIs through a 6-week intensive training.
Developed a full-stack meeting room reservation system from scratch in 6 weeks, including table search/sort, a real-time SQL Server database, business logic APIs, and a third-party calendar plugin.

leadership.title: President
bullets: Coordinated with 5 department directors and over 40 members, managing sponsorships, financial operations, and event planning logistics.
Partnered with global companies (TSMC, Marketech International Corp.) and 5+ local businesses to organize career programs, new student orientation, and cultural festival events.
